title: Remediation and root-cause tracking

compliance.assurance_rationale: Phase-D retagged from meta-multi placeholder to a concrete AU Privacy Act clause. §26WK — remediation evidence is required before the NDB obligation is fully discharged. Assurance level set to 'contributing' pending SME review per Phase E of the plan.

Phase-D retagged from meta-multi placeholder to a concrete PIPL clause. PIPL Art.15 — root-cause and remediation support the ongoing obligation. Assurance level set to 'contributing' pending SME review per Phase E of the plan.

dataSources: Windows Security Event Logs, cloud audit trails, DLP system outputs, consent management platforms, data classification tools, cross-border transfer logs, privacy impact assessments, breach notification records
app: Splunk Enterprise Security (263), Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Windows (742), Splunk Add-on for Microsoft Office 365 (4055), Splunk Add-on for AWS (1876), Splunk Common Information Model Add-on (1621)
spl:
index=privacy sourcetype="breach:event" jurisdiction IN ("SG","TH","JP","KR","CN") earliest=-180d
| eval detected=strptime(detected_at,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
| eval authority=strptime(notified_authority_at,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
| eval individuals=strptime(notified_individuals_at,"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")
| eval sla_h=case(jurisdiction="SG",72,jurisdiction="TH",72,jurisdiction="JP",120,1=1,24+12)
| eval breach=if(isnull(authority) AND (now()-detected)>sla_h*3600,1,0)
| eval register_line="12"
| table breach_id, jurisdiction, breach, register_line
value: Provides APAC privacy supervisory evidence for remediation and root-cause tracking aligned with APAC breach laws.
implementation: (1) Maintain `apac_transfer_register.csv` and consent or DPIA lookups referenced in runbooks. (2) Map technical identifiers to records of processing activities with legal review. (3) Restrict indexes to regional privacy roles with least privilege. (4) Quarterly DPIA and consent linkage review with local counsel.
visualization: Stacked bar (jurisdiction x action), Table (open reviews), Single value (exports without mechanism).
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
